faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.subtitle: INTEL DATABASE — CLEARANCE LEVEL: PUBLIC
faq.footer: KNOWLEDGE BASE v1.0 — ALL DATA VERIFIED
faq.gettingStarted.a1: Portal To Perim is a fan made web-based recreation of the Chaotic Trading Card Game. Players explore Perim, collect cards, build decks, and battle other players in real-time. This is not affiliated with Chaotics ownership in anyway
faq.gettingStarted.q2: How do I create an account?
faq.gettingStarted.a2: Click "ENTER THE GAME" on the landing page, then login with discord (soon to be others). Your account is created automatically on first login.
faq.gettingStarted.a3: Once logged in, the Dromes area is your home base. From there you can explore Perim to scan cards, build decks, and challenge other players. Start by visiting Perim to build your collection!
faq.scanning.a1: New players receive a starter set of creatures, battlegear, mugic, attacks, and locations. Explore Perim locations to scan for additional cards by completing scanquests.
faq.scanning.a2: Scanquests are timed missions at sub-locations within Perim. Start a scanquest, wait for the timer, then complete it to receive a card from that location's pool.
faq.scanning.a3: Adventures are story-driven encounters that can appear during scanquests. They offer narrative choices and can reward special cards or trigger world events.
faq.deckBuilding.q1: How many cards do I need for a deck?
faq.deckBuilding.a1: A complete deck needs 6 creatures, 6 battlegear, 6 mugic, 20 attacks, and 10 locations
faq.deckBuilding.q2: How does the board layout work?
faq.deckBuilding.a2: Each player has 6 creature slots arranged in rows: 1 back, 2 mid, 3 front. Your front row faces the opponent's front row. Adjacent creatures can provide support bonuses in combat.
faq.deckBuilding.a3: Battles are server-authoritative and real-time via WebSocket. Select creatures to engage, play attacks to deal elemental damage, and use mugic for special effects. Reduce all enemy creatures to 0 energy to win.
faq.deckBuilding.a4: At the start of each combat, a location is revealed. Its initiative determines which player attacks first
faq.tribes.a1: There are four main tribes: OverWorld, UnderWorld, Mipedian, and Danian. Each has unique creatures, mugic, and play styles.
faq.tribes.a2: There are four elements: Fire, Water, Air, and Earth. Creatures can have elemental affinities, and attacks deal elemental damage. A creature must have an element to play attacks of that type.
faq.tribes.a3: Mugic are spell cards powered by mugic counters. Each creature has a mugic ability stat that provides counters. Spend counters to cast powerful effects during combat.
faq.profiles.a1: Your profile shows your stats, match history, achievements, and featured cards. You can customize your title, banner, and choose up to 3 featured cards to showcase.
faq.profiles.a2: Codemasters are powerful NPC opponents. Defeating them earns you a unique badge displayed on your profile.
faq.profiles.a3: Achievements are earned through combat, milestones, collection goals, and mastery. They come in four rarity tiers: Common, Uncommon, Rare, and Legendary.

tribeSelect.subtitle: SELECT A TRIBE TO BEGIN YOUR JOURNEY IN PERIM
tribeSelect.tribes.overworld.name: OVERWORLD
tribeSelect.tribes.overworld.desc: Guardians of order and light. OverWorld creatures excel in balanced stats and elemental versatility. Masters of Water and Earth.
tribeSelect.tribes.underworld.name: UNDERWORLD
tribeSelect.tribes.underworld.desc: Conquerors forged in shadow. UnderWorld creatures wield devastating Fire attacks and raw Power. Strength through destruction.
tribeSelect.tribes.mipedian.name: MIPEDIAN
tribeSelect.tribes.mipedian.desc: Desert phantoms who strike unseen. Mipedian creatures use Air and stealth — Invisibility, Warbeasts, and blinding Speed.
tribeSelect.tribes.danian.name: DANIAN
tribeSelect.tribes.danian.desc: The hive endures. Danian creatures use Earth and their Mandiblor swarm — Hive tactics, infection, and unbreakable unity.

news.battle.1.body: After {extra:turns} turns of combat, {player:0} claimed victory. The Dromes grow silent as the dust settles.

news.battle.2.body: The battle raged for {extra:turns} turns before {player:0} emerged triumphant. Perim watches with interest.

news.discovery.0.body: {player:2} uncovered a rare {creature:1} while scanning at {location:0}. Collectors take note.

news.achievement.1.headline: Achievement unlocked: {extra:achievement}
news.achievement.1.body: {player:0} has distinguished themselves in Perim. This accomplishment will not go unnoticed.
news.world_event.0.headline: {world_event:0}: activity reported at {location:1}
news.world_event.0.body: {player:2} contributed to {world_event:0} near {location:1}. The balance of power in Perim may be shifting.

reward.credits.title: CREDITS EARNED
tutorial.welcome.title: WELCOME TO THE DROMES
tutorial.welcome.text: Welcome to the Dromes, player! This is your home base — where you'll manage your cards, battle other players, and port to Perim. Want a quick tour?
tutorial.topbar.title: YOUR STATUS
tutorial.topbar.text: Up here you can see your card count, rank, and credits. As you collect more cards and win battles, your rank climbs from Scout all the way to Codemaster.
tutorial.audio.title: AUDIO CONTROLS
tutorial.audio.text: See that speaker icon? Click it to adjust music and sound effects. The music changes based on where you are — hub, battle, Perim — and you can browse tracks or mute independently.
tutorial.battle.title: BATTLE ARENA
tutorial.battle.text: The Battle Arena is where you fight. Challenge other players, enter the ranked queue for Elo-rated matches, or start with VS AI to practice. Click it to take a look!
tutorial.news.title: PERIM INTEL
tutorial.news.text: Perim Intel is your live news feed — card discoveries, battle results, and world events all show up here. Click it to see what's happening!
tutorial.deck.title: MY DECK
tutorial.deck.text: My Deck is where you browse your entire collection. Inspect card stats, see how you earned each card, and check familiarity bonuses. Click it to take a look!
tutorial.store.title: THE STORE
tutorial.store.text: Earn credits from duplicate card drops. Spend them on avatar cosmetics, battle backgrounds, and card backs. Click to explore!
tutorial.perim.title: PORT TO PERIM
tutorial.perim.text: This is your gateway to Perim — the world where all the creatures live. Click it to open the world map!
tutorial.perimMap.title: THE WORLD MAP
tutorial.perimMap.text: This is Perim! The map shows every location across the OverWorld and UnderWorld. Locations you own are highlighted — you can explore those to scan for new cards. The more you scan a location, the higher your familiarity and the better stat bonuses your creatures get.
tutorial.perimPick.title: PICK A LOCATION
tutorial.perimPick.text: Click on any location you own to see what awaits you there. Each location has sub-locations with unique card pools and adventures.
tutorial.scanquest.title: SCANQUESTS
tutorial.scanquest.text: When you visit a location, you'll be able to start scanquests — timed missions that reward you with cards from that location's loot pool. Sometimes adventures will spawn too — story-driven encounters with choices, skill checks, and special rewards. You can explore Perim anytime from the Dromes!
tutorial.stats.title: LIVE STATS
tutorial.stats.text: Keep an eye on these live stats to see who's online and what battles are happening. The news ticker at the bottom scrolls the latest discoveries and world events.
tutorial.farewell.title: TIME TO BATTLE!
tutorial.farewell.text: Now let's put you in your first match! You'll face Tom Majors in a practice battle — the combat tutorial will walk you through each step as you play. Ready?
tutorial.btn.pickLocation: CLICK A LOCATION ON THE MAP
battleTutorial.label: COMBAT TUTORIAL
battleTutorial.deckBuilding.title: BUILD YOUR DECK
battleTutorial.deckBuilding.text: This is the deck builder. You need to fill every slot — creatures on the board, plus battlegear, mugic, attacks, and locations. For your first game, hit AUTOFILL to let the game build a deck for you, then click LOCK IN DECK to start!
battleTutorial.firstMove.title: YOUR TURN — MOVEMENT
battleTutorial.firstMove.text: It's your turn! Click one of your creatures to select it, then click an empty space or an enemy creature's space to move there. Moving into an enemy's space starts combat. Front-row creatures engage first!
battleTutorial.combatStart.title: COMBAT BEGINS
battleTutorial.combatStart.text: Combat has started! A location was revealed to determine initiative — who strikes first. You and your opponent will now take turns playing attack cards. Watch the energy bars on the left and right — when a creature's energy hits 0, it's defeated!
battleTutorial.firstStrike.title: PLAY AN ATTACK
battleTutorial.firstStrike.text: Choose an attack card from your hand at the bottom. Each attack deals base damage plus elemental damage (Fire, Water, Air, Earth). Pick wisely!
